zh.lifeSummary: 當Sophie von Froburg於1225年出生在瑞士索洛瑟特利巴賀福侯包格時，她的父親Ludwig III. Graf von  Frohburg34歲，母親Gertrud Gräfin von Habsburg34歲。她於1270年2月20日與King of Altenklingen Fredrich Altenklingen I結婚。她去世於1291年11月30日在瑞士瑟爾高享年66歲。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Froburg
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Eward, Kurt.  Scandinavian Nils, Sven.

Swedish (Fröberg): habitational name from any of several places in Sweden named Fröberga, from frö ‘fertile, rich’, or from the name of the Nordic goddess Fröja, + berg ‘mountain, hill’; or possibly an ornamental name composed of the same elements.
Danish (Frøberg): habitational name from a place called Frøbjerg.

nameMeanings.name: Sophie
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   Sophia .  In the English-speaking world, where it is often taken as a pet form of that name, it has been popular since the 18th century, and has become particularly fashionable since the 1990s.

variants.name: Sophy
meanings: form of   Sophia .  In the English-speaking world, where it is often taken as a pet form of that name, it has been popular since the 18th century, and has become particularly fashionable since the 1990s.

historicEvents.description: Three valleys in Central Switzerland unite against the counts of Habsburg and fight for autonomy. Cities join the confederacy. They conquer territories in northern and southern Switzerland.

en.lifeSummary: When Sophie von Froburg was born in 1225, in Froburg, Trimbach, Solothurn, Switzerland, her father, Ludwig III. Graf von  Frohburg, was 34 and her mother, Gertrud Gräfin von Habsburg, was 34. She married King of Altenklingen Fredrich Altenklingen I on 20 February 1270. She died on 30 November 1291, in Thurgau, Switzerland, at the age of 66.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sophie von Froburg est née en 1225, à Froburg, Trimbach, Soleure, Suisse, son père, Ludwig III. Graf von  Frohburg, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Gertrud Gräfin von Habsburg, avait 34 ans. Elle a épousé King of Altenklingen Fredrich Altenklingen I le 20 février 1270. Elle est décédée le 30 novembre 1291, à Turgovie, Suisse, à l’âge de 66 ans.

de.Klingen, Aichach-Friedberg, Bayern, Germ: Klingen, Aichach, Landkreis Aichach-Friedberg, Bayern, Deutschland
de.lifeSummary: Als Sophie von Froburg 1225 in Froburg, Trimbach, Solothurn, Schweiz geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Ludwig III. Graf von  Frohburg 34 und ihre Mutter Gertrud Gräfin von Habsburg 34. Sie hat am 20. Februar 1270 King of Altenklingen Fredrich Altenklingen I geheiratet. Sie starb am 30. November 1291 im Alter von 66 Jahren in Thurgau, Schweiz.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sophie von Froburg è nata il nel 1225 nel Froburg, Trimbach, Soletta, Svizzera, sua padre, Ludwig III. Graf von  Frohburg, aveva 34 anni e sua madre, Gertrud Gräfin von Habsburg, aveva 34 anni. Lei sposato King of Altenklingen Fredrich Altenklingen I il 20 febbraio 1270. Morì il 30 novembre 1291, nel Turgovia, Svizzera, all'età di 66 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Sophie von Froburg(이)가 1225년 스위스 솔스른 트림바치 프로버그에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Ludwig III. Graf von  Frohburg(은)는 34세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Gertrud Gräfin von Habsburg(은)는 34세였다. 그녀는 1270년 2월 20일 King of Altenklingen Fredrich Altenklingen I(와)과 결혼했다. 그녀는 1291년 11월 30일 스위스 스르가에서 66세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sophie von Froburg nasceu em 1225, em Froburg, Trimbach, Solothurn, Suiça, seu pai, Ludwig III. Graf von  Frohburg, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Gertrud Gräfin von Habsburg, tinha 34 anos. Ela casou-se com King of Altenklingen Fredrich Altenklingen I em 20 de fevereiro de 1270. Ela faleceu em 30 de novembro de 1291, em Thurgau, Suiça, com 66 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sophie von Froburg родилась в 1225 г. в местности фробург, тримбач, солотурн, Швейцария, её отцу по имени Ludwig III. Graf von  Frohburg было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Gertrud Gräfin von Habsburg, 34. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени King of Altenklingen Fredrich Altenklingen I 20 февраля 1270 г. Она умерла 30 ноября 1291 г. в местности тургау, Швейцария в возрасте 66 лет.

Graf von  Frohburg, tenía 34 años y su mamá, Gertrud Gräfin von Habsburg, tenía 34 años. Se casó con King of Altenklingen Fredrich Altenklingen I el 20 de febrero de 1270. Murió el 30 de noviembre de 1291, en Thurgau, Suiza, a la edad de 66 años.
